misc.title: #ONEPIECE1185 This is the second time Imu has personally transformed a land and its inhabitants, first the giants, and now the people of God Valley. There was a reason for the giants: he wanted to cre
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1185 This is the second time Imu has personally transformed a land and its inhabitants, first the giants, and now the people of God Valley. There was a reason for the giants: he wanted to create a new army. At God Valley, he only transformed the Davy family. Perhaps the theories suggesting Luven is a Davy could be true.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1185 The way Oda focuses on Candelle's swordsmanship, or the fact that she suddenly fell "ill",sure, she might look innocent right now, but I have a bad feeling about her; she is totally a Ho
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1185 The way Oda focuses on Candelle's swordsmanship, or the fact that she suddenly fell "ill",sure, she might look innocent right now, but I have a bad feeling about her; she is totally a Holy Knight.

misc.text: The best way of Code to redeem himself is by killing off people close to Boruto.
